title: Claude Code — Token & Cost Intelligence
description: Token usage, cost tracking, cache economics, and model efficiency for Claude Code sessions.

list.name: plan_monthly_cost
list.label: Plan Cost ($/mo)
list.description: Claude Max 5x monthly flat cost in USD

targets.expr: sum(sum_over_time({app="claude-token-metrics"} | json | model=~"$model" | project=~"$project" | effort=~"$effort" | unwrap cost_usd [$__interval]))
sum(count_over_time({app="claude-dev-logging", component="lifecycle"} | json | hook_type="session-end" | project=~"$project" [$__interval]))
sum(sum_over_time({app="claude-token-metrics"} | json | model=~"$model" | project=~"$project" | effort=~"$effort" | unwrap cost_usd [$__range]))
sum(count_over_time({app="claude-dev-logging", component="lifecycle"} | json | hook_type="session-end" | project=~"$project" [$__range]))

panels.title: Projected Monthly
panels.description: API-equivalent projected monthly cost at current rate. This is NOT your actual bill — you pay $100/month flat on Max 5x. Above $100 = you're saving money vs API pricing.

targets.expr: sum(rate({app="claude-token-metrics"} | json | model=~"$model" | project=~"$project" | effort=~"$effort" | unwrap cost_usd [$__range])) * 2592000

panels.title: API-Equivalent Cost
panels.description: What you'd pay with a direct API key at retail token rates for the selected time range.

targets.expr: sum(sum_over_time({app="claude-token-metrics"} | json | model=~"$model" | project=~"$project" | effort=~"$effort" | unwrap cost_usd [$__range]))
sum(sum_over_time({app="claude-token-metrics"} | json | model=~"$model" | project=~"$project" | effort=~"$effort" | unwrap cost_usd [$__range]))

panels.title: Saved vs API Pricing
panels.description: How much the Max plan saved you vs paying API rates directly. Positive = you're ahead.

targets.expr: sum(sum_over_time({app="claude-token-metrics"} | json | model=~"$model" | project=~"$project" | effort=~"$effort" | unwrap cost_usd [$__range]))

panels.title: Max Plan ROI
panels.description: API-equivalent cost ÷ plan cost. 5× means you got 5× your money's worth vs API pricing.

targets.expr: sum(sum_over_time({app="claude-token-metrics"} | json | model=~"$model" | project=~"$project" | effort=~"$effort" | unwrap cost_usd [$__range]))

panels.title: API Cost Per Session
panels.description: Each spike = one session's API-equivalent cost. The dashed $100 line = your monthly Max 5x plan cost — once cumulative spend crosses that, you're saving money vs API pricing.

targets.expr: sum(sum_over_time({app="claude-token-metrics"} | json | model=~"$model" | project=~"$project" | effort=~"$effort" | unwrap cost_usd [$__interval]))

panels.title: Session Cost — 7-Day Rolling Average
panels.description: Each bar = API-equivalent cost for that interval. Blue dashed line = 7-day rolling average — rising line means heavier usage trend, falling means lighter.

targets.expr: sum(sum_over_time({app="claude-token-metrics"} | json | model=~"$model" | project=~"$project" | effort=~"$effort" | unwrap cost_usd [$__interval]))
sum by (model) (sum_over_time({app="claude-token-metrics"} | json | model=~"$model" | project=~"$project" | effort=~"$effort" | unwrap cost_usd [$__interval]))
sum by (model) (sum_over_time({app="claude-token-metrics"} | json | model=~"$model" | project=~"$project" | effort=~"$effort" | unwrap cost_usd [$__interval]))
sum by (project) (sum_over_time({app="claude-token-metrics"} | json | model=~"$model" | project=~"$project" | effort=~"$effort" | unwrap cost_usd [$__interval]))
sum by (effort) (count_over_time({app="claude-token-metrics"} | json model, project, effort, cost_usd | model=~"$model" | project=~"$project" | effort=~"$effort" | cost_usd != "" [$__interval]))

panels.title: Context from Cache
panels.description: % of all context tokens served from cache. High values are expected — Claude Code reuses a large context window. Every turn hits the cache; this measures token efficiency, not request hit rate.

targets.expr: sum(sum_over_time({app="claude-token-metrics"} | json | model=~"$model" | project=~"$project" | effort=~"$effort" | unwrap total_cache_read_tokens [$__range]))
sum(sum_over_time({app="claude-token-metrics"} | json | model=~"$model" | project=~"$project" | effort=~"$effort" | unwrap total_input_tokens [$__range]))
sum(sum_over_time({app="claude-token-metrics"} | json | model=~"$model" | project=~"$project" | effort=~"$effort" | unwrap total_cache_creation_tokens [$__range]))
sum(sum_over_time({app="claude-token-metrics"} | json | model=~"$model" | project=~"$project" | effort=~"$effort" | unwrap total_cache_read_tokens [$__interval]))

panels.title: Cache Trend
panels.description: Cache Read vs Cache Creation tokens per interval. Cache Creation (right axis) is orders of magnitude smaller — dual axes show both trends clearly.

targets.expr: sum(sum_over_time({app="claude-token-metrics"} | json | model=~"$model" | project=~"$project" | effort=~"$effort" | unwrap total_cache_read_tokens [$__interval]))
sum(sum_over_time({app="claude-token-metrics"} | json | model=~"$model" | project=~"$project" | effort=~"$effort" | unwrap total_cache_creation_tokens [$__interval]))
sum(sum_over_time({app="claude-token-metrics"} | json | model=~"$model" | project=~"$project" | effort=~"$effort" | unwrap total_input_tokens [$__interval]))
sum(sum_over_time({app="claude-token-metrics"} | json | model=~"$model" | project=~"$project" | effort=~"$effort" | unwrap total_output_tokens [$__interval]))
sum(sum_over_time({app="claude-token-metrics"} | json | model=~"$model" | project=~"$project" | effort=~"$effort" | unwrap total_cache_read_tokens [$__interval]))
sum(sum_over_time({app="claude-token-metrics"} | json | model=~"$model" | project=~"$project" | effort=~"$effort" | unwrap total_cache_creation_tokens [$__interval]))

panels.title: Total Output Tokens
panels.description: Total output tokens generated across all sessions in the selected time range.

targets.expr: sum(sum_over_time({app="claude-token-metrics"} | json | model=~"$model" | project=~"$project" | effort=~"$effort" | unwrap total_output_tokens [$__interval]))

panels.title: Output Tokens / Dollar
panels.description: Output tokens generated per dollar spent. Higher = more efficient.

targets.expr: sum(sum_over_time({app="claude-token-metrics"} | json | model=~"$model" | project=~"$project" | effort=~"$effort" | unwrap total_output_tokens [$__range]))
sum(sum_over_time({app="claude-token-metrics"} | json | model=~"$model" | project=~"$project" | effort=~"$effort" | unwrap cost_usd [$__range]))
sum(sum_over_time({app="claude-token-metrics"} | json | model=~"$model" | project=~"$project" | effort=~"$effort" | unwrap assistant_turns [$__range]))
sum(count_over_time({app="claude-dev-logging", component="lifecycle"} | json | hook_type="session-end" | project=~"$project" [$__range]))

panels.title: Token Usage by Type
panels.description: Token consumption by type per interval. Context (cache reads) dominates — that's Claude reusing its persistent context window. Output includes extended thinking tokens when thinking mode is on.

targets.expr: sum(sum_over_time({app="claude-token-metrics"} | json | model=~"$model" | project=~"$project" | effort=~"$effort" | unwrap total_cache_read_tokens [$__interval]))
sum(sum_over_time({app="claude-token-metrics"} | json | model=~"$model" | project=~"$project" | effort=~"$effort" | unwrap total_cache_creation_tokens [$__interval]))
sum(sum_over_time({app="claude-token-metrics"} | json | model=~"$model" | project=~"$project" | effort=~"$effort" | unwrap total_output_tokens [$__interval]))
sum(sum_over_time({app="claude-token-metrics"} | json | model=~"$model" | project=~"$project" | effort=~"$effort" | unwrap total_input_tokens [$__interval]))
avg by (model) (avg_over_time({app="claude-token-metrics"} | json | model=~"$model" | project=~"$project" | effort=~"$effort" | unwrap cost_usd [$__range]))
avg by (model) (avg_over_time({app="claude-token-metrics"} | json | model=~"$model" | project=~"$project" | effort=~"$effort" | unwrap total_output_tokens [$__range]))
{app="claude-token-metrics"} | json | model=~"$model" | project=~"$project" | effort=~"$effort"
